appName: Chronicles of Meterea: An AI Adventure

mainMenu.title: Chronicles of Meterea: An AI Adventure

settingsMenu.title: Settings
settingsMenu.localModelWarning: ⚠️ WARNING: Game context reaches 100,000 tokens! Local models require a VERY powerful GPU (16-24+ GB VRAM).
settingsMenu.promptCaching: Prompt Caching (Speeds up responses and lowers cost)
settingsMenu.enableLocalMapDesc: Creates 2D floor plans. Disable to save API tokens.

fsa.directoryNotSelected: Save folder not selected. Using browser storage.
fsa.permissionGrantedPreviouslyNeedsAction: Folder was selected. Click to re-confirm access.
fsa.permissionRequiredOperation: Permission to access the folder is required for this operation.
fsa.permissionRevokedError: Permission to access the folder was revoked or lost. Please select the folder again.

characterCreation.title: Character Creation
characterCreation.errorFillFields: Please fill in all fields and distribute all points.
characterCreation.confirmPointsLeft: You have {points} unspent points. Are you sure you want to continue?

tooltips.name: Enter your hero's name. For example: Aragorn, Liara T'Soni, Borg the Fearless.
tooltips.desc: Describe your character's appearance, personality, or a brief backstory.

characterCreation.eraRebirthDesc: The ashes of the old world have become the soil for new kingdoms. Forgotten magic awakens in ancient ruins, and on unexplored lands, brave heroes seek fame and fortune. A classic adventure awaits.
characterCreation.eraArchitectsDesc: Cities of glass and light float in the sky, while arcane constructs glide through the streets. This is an era of wonders, the pinnacle of magic and technology. But behind the shining facade, conspiracies that could plunge the world into chaos are brewing.
characterCreation.eraSunderingDesc: Reality is tearing at the seams. Aether storms consume the lands, distorting everything they touch. Civilization is but a handful of shelters in a dying world. There are no heroes here, only survivors. And each new day could be the last.
characterCreation.eraSilenceDesc: The world has fallen silent. Great cities have turned to dust, knowledge has become legend. Among the desolate ruins wander mutated monsters and handfuls of desperate people, willing to do anything for a sip of water. Your goal is simple - to survive until dawn.
characterCreation.eraRebirthDescForGM: Era of Rebirth. Classic fantasy. Civilizations are slowly recovering from an ancient cataclysm. Atmosphere of exploration, hope, and danger in the ruins of the past. Magic exists, but it is not all-powerful.
characterCreation.eraArchitectsDescForGM: Golden Age of Architects. A highly developed world in a mana-punk/arcane-punk style. Flying cities, magical constructs, complex political intrigues. Technology and magic are fused. Create a sense of grandeur, but also of hidden decay.
characterCreation.eraSunderingDescForGM: The Great Sundering. Cosmic horror and post-apocalypse. The world is literally falling apart. Aether storms distort reality. The main goal is survival and finding a safe haven. Atmosphere of despair, madness, and constant threat.
characterCreation.eraSilenceDescForGM: Era of Silence. Grim survival in a world after the fall of civilization. Knowledge is lost, resources are extremely scarce. Danger comes not only from mutated creatures but also from other desperate survivors. Atmosphere of hopelessness with rare glimpses of hope.

worldSetup.title: World Simulation Setup
worldSetup.yearsDesc: Determines how many years the world will develop autonomously before your arrival (wars, economy, intrigues).
worldSetup.agentsDesc: Number of unique NPCs with their own needs, jobs, and goals. More agents = a livelier world, but longer generation time.

loadGame.title: Load Game
loadGame.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the save '{slotType} #{slotId}'? This action cannot be undone.
loadGame.errorStorageFull: Failed to save the game. Browser storage might be full. Try deleting old saves.
loadGame.errorSlotFull: Failed to save to manual slot #{slotId}: All {max} slots are occupied.
loadGame.errorSlotFullLS: Failed to save to manual slot #{slotId} (localStorage): All {max} slots are occupied.
loadGame.errorSaveCorrupted: Save data is incomplete or corrupted.

combat.title: Combat System
combat.desc1: Combat is automated but depends on your descriptions and dice rolls.
combat.p1: Rolls (D20): Use the macro panel (⚔️ Attack, 🛡️ Defend buttons) before sending a message. The AI will compare your roll with the Difficulty Class (DC).
combat.p2: Momentum: Successful rolls increase momentum (up to +5), failures decrease it (down to -5). High momentum makes enemies make mistakes, low momentum corners you.
combat.p3: Damage & Death: Enemies don't die 'just because'. You must reduce their HP to 0. If you miss, the enemy strikes back.
combat.p4: Yielding: If you write 'I surrender' or 'I don't resist', combat ends and the scene transitions to negotiations, capture, or 18+.

nsfw.title: Relationships & Erotica (18+)
nsfw.desc1: The game supports a deep relationship system and explicit content (if enabled in settings).
nsfw.p1: Parameters: Each NPC has Affection, Attraction, Trust, and Intimacy. Consensual sex requires high stats.
nsfw.p2: Porn Mode: Enabled in settings. Increases erotic scene frequency 3x, halves relationship requirements, NPCs take initiative.
nsfw.p3: Consequences: Pregnancy (lowers stats for 9 months), STDs (require treatment), and reputation loss for public scandals are possible.
nsfw.p4: Intimate Diary: All your scenes are automatically recorded in a special journal in the right panel.

economy.title: Economy & Business
economy.desc1: The world runs on supply and demand. You can become a tycoon.
economy.p1: Trading: Prices change dynamically. If a city starves, bread gets expensive. Buy low, hire caravans, and sell where there's a deficit.
economy.p2: Your Business: You can build a farm, forge, or tavern (type in chat: 'I want to open a business'). In the 'Holdings' panel, you can hire workers, set wages, and production focus.
economy.p3: Logistics: Set up routes for your business. Example: Buy ore at market -> Produce swords -> Send to capital warehouse.
economy.p4: Banks: You can take loans or deposit money for interest. Unpaid debts will result in a visit from collectors.

world.title: World, Factions & Travel
world.desc1: Global simulation runs in the background, even while you sleep.
world.p1: Travel: Moving between cities takes time. Click 'Forward into the unknown' while traveling. You may be attacked by bandits or find ruins. A horse or wagon speeds up travel.
world.p2: Factions & Wars: States fight, form alliances, and plot intrigues. You can influence this through quests, or even found your own faction and conquer cities.
world.p3: Disasters & Monsters: Floods, epidemics, and Epic Monsters appear in the world. They destroy roads and kill the population.
world.p4: Chronicles: Read the 'World Chronicles' in the right panel to know where wars are and where it's safe to trade.

general.howToPlayDesc: You control the hero by describing their actions in text. The Artificial Intelligence (Unified Game Master) reacts to your words, calculates mechanics, and creates a living story.
general.rule1: Unified Game Master: The AI acts simultaneously as a strict judge and a talented writer. It monitors the world's logic, your stats, and inventory, preventing impossible actions.
general.rule2: World Interaction: Your actions have consequences. If you attack a guard, you might be killed or imprisoned. If you help a merchant, market prices might drop.
general.freedom: Freedom of Action: You can do anything — from stealing apples at the market to founding your own empire. The world of Meterea is completely open to your decisions.

api.quote: «To breathe life into a golem, a spark of Aether is needed.»

basics.title: What is an API and why is it needed?
basics.p1: The game does not have a built-in 'brain'. All logic, text generation, and world management happen through external neural networks (LLMs). An API key is your personal pass to these networks.
basics.p2: Tokens: These are pieces of words. Neural networks 'read' and 'write' in tokens. 1000 tokens ≈ 750 words.
basics.p3: Context Window: This is the short-term memory capacity of the neural network. How much text it can hold in its head at one time.

reqs.title: FATAL MODEL REQUIREMENTS
reqs.warning: WARNING! This game is not a standard chatbot. It is a complex simulator. If you choose a weak model, the game will BREAK on the very first turn.
reqs.contextDesc: Every turn, the game sends the neural network a gigantic world snapshot: your entire inventory, stats, equipped armor, quest list, era lore, combat rules, nearby NPCs, and economic summary. This takes between 15,000 and 30,000 tokens per request. If a model has an 8k token limit (like many older or free models), it will simply 'forget' half the rules and start hallucinating.
reqs.logicTitle: 2. High Intelligence and Strict JSON Adherence
reqs.logicDesc: The model acts as a game engine. It MUST return its response STRICTLY in programming code format (JSON). It has to calculate damage, modify variables, and issue items itself. 'Dumb' models (Llama 3 8B, Gemma 2B, old GPT-3.5) cannot handle this task. They will start writing plain text instead of code, causing a CRITICAL PARSING ERROR (JSON Error).
reqs.censorDesc: The game world is harsh (Dark Fantasy). Requests to the AI contain instructions for calculating damage, murders, thefts, and (if enabled) NSFW content. Heavily censored corporate models may refuse to answer the request, blocking the game.

providers.title: Recommended Providers
providers.openrouterDesc: An AI aggregator. Allows you to use the best models in the world without VPNs or complex registrations. Accepts crypto.
providers.openrouterRec: Recommended models: google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview (Ideal: cheap and smart), anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet (Excellent, but more expensive).
providers.geminiDesc: Google provides free access to excellent models (Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite Preview), but with strict limits (15 requests per minute, 1500 per day). Due to the game's massive context size, Google may temporarily block you (Error 429).
providers.deepseekDesc: The deepseek-chat (V3) model has excellent logic and costs pennies. However, their servers are often overloaded.
providers.llmostDesc: A convenient service for players from the Russian Federation. Payment with ruble cards. Recommended models: Claude 3.5 Sonnet or GPT-4o.
providers.localDesc: WARNING: Do not try to run the game on graphics cards with 8 GB of memory! To load a model capable of holding 30k+ context and outputting complex JSON (e.g., Qwen 2.5 32B or Llama 3 70B), you will need at least 24 GB of VRAM (RTX 3090 / 4090) or a powerful Mac (M2/M3 Max with 64+ GB of memory).

trouble.title: Troubleshooting Common Issues
trouble.errJsonTitle: Error: Game Master Response Corrupted (JSON Error)
trouble.errJsonDesc:
Cause: The selected model is too 'dumb'. It failed to format the response code correctly and wrote plain text.
Solution: Change the model to a smarter one (Claude 3.5 Sonnet, GPT-4o, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite Preview).
trouble.err400Desc:
Cause: The text the game sent to the neural network exceeded its memory limit (Context Window).
Solution: Choose a model with a context of at least 64k (preferably 128k).
trouble.err429Desc:
Cause: You have exhausted the request limit with the provider (very common on the free Gemini tier).
Solution: Wait a few minutes or switch to a paid API (e.g., OpenRouter).
trouble.errBlockedDesc:
Cause: The neural network's built-in censorship triggered on violence or erotica in the scene.
Solution: Use uncensored models or models with low filtration levels via OpenRouter.

itemDescriptions.shortSword: A simple but reliable short sword. Basic melee weapon.
itemDescriptions.woodenShield: A round wooden shield. Provides minimal protection.
itemDescriptions.smallHealthPotion: A small vial with a red liquid. Restores a bit of health.
itemDescriptions.simpleStaff: A smooth wooden staff. Helps to focus magical energy.
itemDescriptions.noviceRobe: A simple robe worn by novice mages. Offers almost no protection.
itemDescriptions.smallManaPotion: A small vial with a blue liquid. Restores a bit of mana.
itemDescriptions.basicDagger: A common dagger. A fast but weak weapon.
itemDescriptions.lightLeatherArmor: Light armor made of treated leather. Provides some protection without hindering movement.
itemDescriptions.lockpicks: A set of thin metal tools for picking locks.
itemDescriptions.simpleLute: A simple lute. An instrument for bardic songs and spells.
itemDescriptions.colorfulClothes: Bright and comfortable clothes, suitable for performances.
itemDescriptions.gold: Shiny gold coins. The main currency.

elara.name: Elara, the Chronicler
elara.desc: A wise and impartial keeper of stories. Her narrative follows the canons of classic heroic fantasy. Great deeds, noble quests, and a world where good and evil have clear outlines await you.

krieg.name: Krieg, the Unforgiving
krieg.desc: A cynic hardened in hundreds of battles, for whom survival is already a victory. His world is harsh and unforgiving. Resources are scarce, enemies are smart, and every decision has irreversible consequences. Only for those ready for real challenges.

faelan.name: Faelan, the Dreamweaver
faelan.desc: A poet and romantic, for whom feelings and relationships are paramount. His story is a drama about love, betrayal, and difficult moral choices. Dialogues and personal stories of characters come to the forefront here, and battles are just a backdrop for great passions.

optimization.summarizing: The GM is systematizing memories of recent events...

warning.languageChangedInGame: Language has been changed. World details (lore, locations) will be fully updated upon restarting the game.

geminiPrompt.gmConfirm_v3: CONFIRMED. I am the Game Master. Ready to describe the world, react to the player's actions, manage NPCs, quests, combat, and follow all instructions. I will respond in English.

businessModal.emptyLog: Log is empty. Run time simulation.
businessModal.autoBuyTitle: Automatically buy raw materials from the local market using company funds if stock is low.
businessModal.autoSellTitle: Automatically sell finished products to the local market, replenishing company funds.

chronicles.empty: No records in this category for the selected period...

debugPanel.noFaction: You don't have your own faction.

settings.promptCaching: Prompt Caching (Speeds up responses and lowers cost)
settings.autoTesterDesc: This AI will play instead of you. It receives a world snapshot and makes decisions. Launch from Admin Menu (F4).
settings.localMapWarn: WARNING: Feature in early development stage.
settings.localMapDesc: May cause AI errors, hallucinations, and break formatting. Not recommended for a full playthrough. Disable for stable gameplay.
settings.deepSetupDesc: Makes 5 consecutive requests to AI when starting a new game. Creates a highly detailed biography, unique loot, and environment. Takes more time. Not recommended for free Gemini keys due to rate limits.
settings.lowSpecDesc: Disables fog, particles, and background parallax. Significantly reduces CPU and GPU load.

apiErrors.503: Service Unavailable. The AI provider is overloaded. Try again later.
apiErrors.504: Gateway Timeout. The AI provider took too long to respond.
apiErrors.network: Network Error. Check your internet connection or disable VPN/AdBlock.

news.annexation: VICTORY: {faction} achieved its war goals by annexing {region}. The war is over.
news.capital_fallen: FALL OF THE CAPITAL: {region} captured! Faction {oldFaction} capitulates and is fully annexed by {newFaction}.
news.siege_lifted: SIEGE LIFTED! The militia of {region} repelled the assault of {faction}.
news.army_starved: The army of faction {faction} disbanded due to starvation and zero morale!
news.naval_invasion: NAVAL INVASION: The army of faction {faction} successfully landed in {dest}!
news.pirate_base_found: PIRATES: A hidden pirate base was discovered in the waters near {region}!
news.pirates_spotted: PIRATES: Pirate ships spotted in the waters near {region}!
news.naval_battle_artillery: NAVAL BATTLE (Artillery): The fleets of {f1} and {f2} are exchanging fire at a distance!
news.naval_battle_boarding: NAVAL BATTLE (Boarding): The fleet of {winner} boarded and captured the ships of {loser}!
news.naval_skirmish: NAVAL BATTLE: Clash of ships ({f1} vs {f2}).
news.pirate_base_destroyed: FLEET: A warship of faction {faction} destroyed a pirate base! The threat in the region is reduced, treasures captured.
news.ship_sunk: SHIPWRECK: A vessel of faction {faction} went to the bottom.
news.ship_built: SHIPYARD: Construction of a new ship completed in the port of {region}!
news.sea_monster_battle: BATTLE WITH A MONSTER: A warship is fighting a sea leviathan!
news.sea_monster_killed: VICTORY: The sea monster was killed by the military fleet!
news.sea_monster_attack: DISASTER: A sea monster attacks a merchant ship!
news.fleet_formed: FLEET: Faction {faction} formed a military fleet and sent it to blockade the port of {dest}!
news.plague_outbreak: Plague outbreak in {region}! Hunger and overcrowding led to an epidemic. {deaths} people died.
news.drought_struck: A terrifying drought struck {region}. The wheat crop died, forests are burning.
news.hunger_riots: Hunger riots in {region}! The unemployed are smashing warehouses and forges.
news.starvation_starts: Starvation begins to rage in {region}. Supplies are exhausted, people are weakening.
news.price_up: Prices for '{good}' in {region} have risen due to supply changes.
news.price_down: Prices for '{good}' in {region} have fallen due to supply changes.
news.acute_shortage: Acute shortage of '{good}' in {region}. Supplies are running out, prices are significantly higher than normal.
news.overproduction: Overproduction of '{good}' in {region}. Warehouses are full, prices have collapsed.
news.ruins_awakened: RUMORS: Treasure hunters delved too deep into the ruins of {region}, awakening something sinister...
news.evil_awakened: AWAKENING OF EVIL: A monster appeared in the region {region} - {monster}!
news.threat_grows: THREAT GROWS: The monster {monster} has become stronger (Level {level})!
news.monster_bounty: MONSTER BOUNTY: Faction {faction} hired heroes. The monster {monster} received severe wounds!
news.monster_migration: MONSTER MIGRATION: {monster} left {from} and headed to {to}!
news.dragon_settled: DISASTER: An ancient Dragon settled in the region {region}! A crater formed, trade routes are cut!
news.dragon_liberated: LIBERATION: The threat in {region} has passed. Roads are being repaired, craters filled.
news.great_hunt: GREAT HUNT: Faction {faction} gathered an army of veterans and sent it to destroy the monster {monster}!
news.great_threat_truce: GREAT THREAT: Factions {faction1} and {faction2} stopped the war to unite against the monster {monster}!
news.epic_victory: EPIC VICTORY: The army of {faction} destroyed the monster {monster} in {region} at the cost of huge losses!
news.army_destroyed_by_monster: TRAGEDY: The army of {faction} was completely destroyed by the monster {monster} in {region}!
news.king_fallen_monster: FALL OF THE KING: Ruler {ruler} fell in battle with a monster!
news.battle_with_monster: BATTLE WITH A MONSTER: The army of {faction} is fighting a bloody battle with {monster}. Both sides suffer casualties.
news.flood_receded: The flood receded. The water returns to its banks.
news.volcano_stopped: The volcanic eruption stopped, but lava and ash forever changed the landscape.
news.cascade_tsunami: CASCADE DISASTER: The earthquake caused a devastating tsunami/flood!
news.cascade_wildfire: CASCADE DISASTER: The drought triggered wildfires!
news.dam_held: ELEMENTS TAMED: The dam in {region} withstood the water pressure, preventing a catastrophic flood.
news.flood: FLOOD! Rivers overflowed their banks in the region {region}.
news.earthquake: EARTHQUAKE! Powerful tremors shook {region}, destroying buildings and roads.
news.wildfire: WILDFIRE! Forests around {region} are engulfed in flames.
news.plague: EPIDEMIC! A deadly disease is spreading in {region}.
news.drought: DROUGHT! The harvest in {region} is dying under the scorching sun.
news.aether_storm: AETHER STORM! Magical anomalies distort reality in {region}.
news.monster_invasion: MONSTER INVASION! Hordes of monsters attacked {region}, cutting off roads.
news.volcano: VOLCANIC ERUPTION! Lava and ash destroy everything around {region}.
news.storm: STORM! Furious waves sink ships off the coast of {region}.
news.tsunami: TSUNAMI! A giant wave hit the ports of {region}!
news.sea_monster: SEA MONSTER! A kraken spotted in the waters of {region}, trade is paralyzed.
news.local_delivery: LOGISTICS: Local carts transported {amount} {good} from enterprise ({facility}) to warehouse.
news.corp_caravan_sent: LOGISTICS: Enterprise ({facility}) sent a corporate caravan to {dest} ({amount} {good}).
news.local_pickup: LOGISTICS: Local loaders delivered {amount} {good} to enterprise ({facility}).
news.corp_caravan_pickup: LOGISTICS: Corporate caravan picked up {amount} {good} from {source} and headed to enterprise.
news.order_placed: LOGISTICS: Enterprise ({facility}) placed an order for {amount} {good}.
news.magic_currents_changed: Global aether currents have shifted their direction. Mages across the world feel uneasy.
news.merchant_investment: Successful merchant {merchant} invested capital in a new enterprise: {business}.

infrastructure.dam_built: INFRASTRUCTURE: Faction {faction} built a Dam in {region}, taming the river and draining floodplains for farmland.
infrastructure.aqueduct_built: INFRASTRUCTURE: A magnificent Aqueduct was erected in {region}. Land fertility has significantly increased.
infrastructure.wells_built: SANITATION: A network of stone wells was built in {region}, preventing epidemics.
infrastructure.road_built: INFRASTRUCTURE: Engineers of {faction} built a grand highway with bridges to the isolated region of {region}.

naval.sea_monster_battle: MONSTER BATTLE: A warship fights a sea leviathan!
naval.sea_monster_killed: VICTORY: The sea monster was slain by the navy!
naval.sea_monster_attacks_trade: DISASTER: A sea monster attacks a trade vessel!
naval.blockade_trade_blocked: BLOCKADE: A trade ship could not enter the blockaded port of {port} and dumped its cargo into the sea.
naval.trade_arrived: MARITIME TRADE: A vessel arrived at port {port}! Delivered: {goods}. Revenue: {revenue} g. (Port fee: {fee} g.)
naval.ship_departed: FLEET: Trade vessel '{ship}' departed from {origin} to {dest} with cargo {cargo}

diplomacy.defensive_pact: DIPLOMACY: Fearing aggression, {ruler} signs a defensive pact with faction {ally}.
diplomacy.peace_treaty: PEACE TREATY: Exhausted by prolonged war, {faction1} and {faction2} have agreed to a ceasefire.
diplomacy.trade_agreement: ECONOMY: {ruler} signs a lucrative trade agreement with {target}.
diplomacy.dynastic_marriage: DYNASTIC MARRIAGE: Houses {faction1} and {faction2} are united in marriage!
diplomacy.forced_peace: FORCED PEACE: Faction {faction} is completely exhausted by war and capitulates to the status quo.
diplomacy.ultimatum_rejected_war: ULTIMATUM REJECTED: {issuer} goes to war against {faction}!
diplomacy.coalition_formed: A coalition against {faction} has been formed, led by {leader}.
diplomacy.ultimatum_rejected_threat: ULTIMATUM REJECTED: {issuer} threatens consequences, but open war has not yet begun.
diplomacy.ultimatum_issued: ULTIMATUM: {issuer} demands {faction} immediately cease hostilities, or they will intervene!
diplomacy.mediation: MEDIATION: {mediator} organized peace talks between {faction1} and {faction2}. Tensions are easing.
diplomacy.humanitarian_aid: AID: Faction {faction} sent a humanitarian food convoy to famine-stricken faction {target}. Relations significantly improved.

war.war_declared: WAR: {ruler} ({faction}) declares war on faction {target}! Motive: {motive}.
war.intrigue_launched: INTRIGUE: {ruler} launches a covert operation ({type}) against {target}!
war.unprovoked_aggression: AGGRESSION: Faction {faction} started a war without provocation! The world community condemns this.
war.total_war: TOTAL WAR: {faction} failed to achieve limited war objectives and throws all forces into battle!

news.army_deployed: An army of {faction} ({size} warriors) marched from {origin} on campaign against {target}.

logistics.supply_convoy: SUPPLY: Faction {faction} sent a food convoy to the starving region of {region}.

trade.state_purchase: STATE PURCHASE: Starving faction {faction} bought {amount} food from {seller} for {cost} gold.

log.logistics_error_receiver: ⚠️ Logistics Error: Receiver warehouse does not accept {good}.
log.logistics_error_city_full: ⚠️ City warehouse is full. Waiting to unload.
log.internal_sale: 💵 Internal sale ({good}, {amount} pcs.) to branch '{facility}': +{cost} g.
log.internal_purchase: 💸 Internal purchase ({good}, {amount} pcs.) from branch '{facility}': -{cost} g.
log.internal_no_money: ⚠️ Denied: Receiving branch has no money to pay for raw materials.
log.city_no_money: ⚠️ Denied: City treasury has no money to buyout.
log.no_money_import: ⚠️ Denied: No money to buy raw materials from city warehouse.
log.corp_caravan_pickup: 🐪 Caravan heading to us: carrying {amount} {good} from {source}.
log.wrong_product: ⚠️ Error: Enterprise cannot produce the selected good!

trek.river_crossing: A turbulent river blocks the path. No bridge in sight, the water looks dangerous. You'll have to find a ford or build a raft.
trek.ruin_discovery: Among the gray wastelands, you stumble upon the skeleton of an ancient structure. The wind howls in empty windows. Perhaps there is something valuable inside.
trek.caravan_spotted: A merchant caravan ({wagons} wagons) appeared on the horizon, heading to {dest}. They are guarded by {guards} mercenaries.
trek.army_spotted: You stumbled upon the army of faction {faction} ({size} warriors). The troops are {state}.
trek.bandit_ambush: Suddenly, armed men appear from cover! A bandit ambush! They demand your purse or your life.
trek.weather_changed: The weather has changed. It is now: {weather}.
trek.disaster_zone: WARNING! You have entered an active disaster zone: {disaster}. It is deadly to be here.
trek.arrival: You have successfully reached your destination.

transport.notTransport: This item is not a transport
